theme_and_archetype.description: Objective, rigid, function-first control room. Perfect for IT incident management where clarity and rapid action are critical. Uses high-contrast monochromatic base with highly functional, intense accent colors for prioritization.

hierarchy.label_overline: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-tertiary font-mono

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-[1600px] mx-auto p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8

grid_system.left_pane: col-span-1 lg:col-span-4 flex flex-col gap-6 sticky top-6

surface_styles.terminal_block: bg-[#0B0C10] text-[#F9FAFB] border border-black p-4 font-mono text-sm
surface_styles.glassmorphism: Not recommended for this archetype. Stick to flat, solid surfaces.

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-gray-800 rounded-none font-bold tracking-wide px-6 py-3 border border-transparent transition-all active:translate-y-px
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-black border border-black/20 hover:border-black rounded-none font-bold tracking-wide px-6 py-3 transition-all

inputs.textarea: min-h-[300px] w-full border border-black/20 bg-white p-4 font-mono text-sm focus:border-black focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black outline-none transition-all rounded-none resize-y
inputs.input: w-full border border-black/20 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm focus:border-black focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black outline-none transition-all rounded-none

badges.p1: bg-red-50 text-red-600 border border-red-200 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none inline-flex items-center gap-2
badges.p2: bg-amber-50 text-amber-600 border border-amber-200 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none inline-flex items-center gap-2
badges.p3: bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 border border-blue-200 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none inline-flex items-center gap-2
badges.warning: bg-[#FFF9DB] text-[#B08800] border border-[#FFE066] px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none inline-flex items-center gap-2

motion_and_interactions.loading_state: Use an ASCII spinner (e.g., | / - \) or a pulsing monochrome block. For the analyzing card, apply a subtle 'Tracing Beam' or border-pulse animation to indicate AI processing.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp and immediate. Elements should feel tactile. Use sharp box-shadows (e.g., 4px 4px 0px black) rather than soft blur shadows.

iconography.style: Regular or Bold weight. Keep them sharp and distinct.
iconography.usage: Use icons strictly for functional meaning (e.g., Warning, Check, Copy, Arrows), not decoration.

logo.description: Minimalist geometric abstract logo for the top-left brand header

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Ensure Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono are imported via Google Fonts in index.html or index.css.
SHADCN OVERRIDES: Override Shadcn component defaults. Remove `rounded-md` from everywhere to maintain the strict brutalist/Swiss aesthetic (`rounded-none`).
LAYOUT STRUCTURE: Use a strictly asymmetrical layout. A narrower left column for the raw ticket input, and a wider right column containing a bento grid of the AI Analysis results.
BRIDGE COMMUNICATION: Format the 'P1 Bridge Communication Updates' as a dark terminal-like block (`bg-[#0B0C10]`) so it stands out as a copy-paste artifact. Include a 'Copy to Clipboard' button.
CONFIDENCE SCORE: Display the score prominently. If score < 80, render the 'Needs Human Review' indicator using the warning badge style with a Phosphor Warning icon.

LOADING STATE: When the 'Analyze' button is clicked, disable the button and show a highly technical loading state (like 'ANALYZING THREAT VECTOR...' with an ASCII spinner) before rendering the right pane.

TESTING ATTRIBUTES: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (e.g., `data-testid="ticket-input"`, `data-testid="analyze-button"`, `data-testid="priority-badge"`, `data-testid="bridge-update-copy"`).
